programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Mike & Nellie's Steakhouse in Oakhurst, New Jersey, where owner Mike Farber is mourning his father Nellie, who was also his business partner. Having been called in by the restaurateur's two daughters, Gordon faces the task of getting him to focus on his business, before tackling the bigger problem of rotting decor and a less-than-appealing menu.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Maggie and Alistair from Edinburgh dream of buying a holiday home on the southern coast of Gran Canaria. Jasmine Harman lines up five potential properties for their £350,000 budget.(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw work on a 1971 Fiat Dino coupe for an ex-mechanic who had to put the restoration of the vehicle on hold when he was diagnosed with a rare type of cancer. During the process, Tim takes a drive in one of the most beautiful cars in the world and Fuzz gets his hands on a Ferrari racing engine for the first time.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition starts at the Inn at the Park in Aberdeen, where owners Ronnie and Steph Caird hope to impress their guests and be named best value for money at the end of the week.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In the West Midlands, the first host, company director Sue, promises an evening her guests will never forget. Joining her are business guru Marc, teaching assistant Kim, manager Paul and mole catcher Michael. Sue hopes to get things off to a great start, but when her starter reminds Kim of baby food and Marc of toilets, things begin to look bleak.(n)

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Berkshire, beauty therapist Emma and her boyfriend Sean kick off the week with an night of acronyms, pet names and fine food. On day two, the experienced partnership of Jasbir and Sarb attempt to wow their guests with a night of authentic Indian food and Bollywood dancing. Finally, Mel and Tony host with a menu filled with traditional British classics in a bid to win the £1,000 prize.(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray refuses to take Debra to an awards ceremony, tired of her constant lateness, while Frank and Robert get into their own heated debate about the importance of punctuality. American comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton, Peter Boyle and Doris Roberts.(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra wants to buy an expensive dress for Ally to wear to a friend's 13th birthday party, but Ray refuses to spend $250 on something that will only be used once, and naturally Marie takes his side. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Madylin Sweeten.(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Cam Winston and Frasier decide to suspend hostilities for the sake of their parents, who have supposedly fallen for each other - though their late-blossoming romance could just be a clever subterfuge. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer.(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: In Boston for a conference, Frasier and his family bump into many of his former Cheers cronies celebrating Cliff's retirement. Niles is overwhelmed with boredom, but Martin hits it off with Norm - an occasion that promises to cause more than a little embarrassment. Comedy, guest starring Rhea Perlman, George Wendt and John Ratzenberger.(n)

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer are in Cardiff to help another two couples find their dream home. Jo and Steve are relocating from Bristol to cut down on her commute to work, and Kirstie is on hand to provide them with advice on suitable properties for their needs. Phil accompanies Shauna and Todd, who admit their pricey taste in property is making it tough to find a family home.(n)

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: A Devon couple get more than they bargained for when they take on an unloved hotel in France, while a couple from Kent buy a B&B that already has guests staying.(n)

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Vet Will transports a bull elephant to a new home, while marine biologist Alison prepares to release three critically endangered African penguins back into the ocean.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay travels to the El Greco restaurant in Austin, Texas, where the owners have resorted to using a microwave to prepare their 'authentic' Greek dishes. Gordon faces the difficult task of uniting a squabbling family before tackling the bigger problem of a business on the brink of collapse.(n)

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Presenters Sandi Toksvig and Noel Fielding, along with judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith, welcome four more celebrities into the tent to expose their soft centres. Broadcaster Jeremy Paxman, comedian Joe Wilkinson, actress Sally Lindsay and reality star Georgia Toffolo make characterful biscuits for their Signature challenge, followed by a Technical that leaves them nowhere to hide, and finally they make a cake in the shape of their favourite hobby. They're baking to inspire viewers to do the same and raise money for Stand Up to Cancer.(n)

programme.title: First Dates Hotel
programme.desc: Online relationship guru Breeny spends her time advising others on their love lives, but has yet to find 'The One' herself. She wants a man with spirit - something that 6ft personal trainer Bavoray is not short of. Mum of two Lisa lost the love of her life three years ago and is now looking for someone to spend the future with - crucially someone who isn't bald. Her date is businessman Steve McCool. But will his full head of hair be enough in the end? Make-up artist Kiera is paired up with Jack, an Essex builder with an extremely thorough pre-date beauty regime.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity SAS: Who Dares Wins
programme.desc: The six remaining famous faces undergo the final stage of this intense version of SAS selection in the Inner Hebrides under the guidance of chief instructor Ant Middleton and his team of Foxy, Billy, Ollie and Jay. Over the course of 48 hours, the celebrity recruits take on the interrogation phase, a torturous exercise where the interrogators keep ramping up the punishments, with the recruits being put through horrendous torture techniques. Only the physically and mentally elite make it to the end and pass the course.(n)

programme.title: Old People's Home for 4 Year Olds
programme.desc: Ten four year olds are half way through an ambitious six-week experiment, as they share their classroom with 11 pensioners who all follow the same timetable in a nursery near Bristol. Has the energy and activities of the younger group had a measurable impact on the pensioners? Can this ambitious experiment transform the way Britain cares for its increasingly older population?(n)

programme.title: How to Go on Holiday This Summer
programme.desc: Steph McGovern investigates whether it is possible to get away safely this summer, answering some of the burning questions, whether travelling abroad or holidaying in the UK. From whether we should we book now and what the least risky way to travel is, to the trips we've already paid for and if we should cancel them and seek a refund or cross our fingers.(n)

programme.title: A Very British Hotel Chain: Inside Best Western
programme.desc: Documentary on the hotel company, which has 265 outlets across the United Kingdom, following its staff as they try to make a profit in the face of tough competition. In the first episode, recently-hired CEO Rob Paterson talks about rejuvenating the brand, tasking his team at the company headquarters in York with doubling their membership to 500 hotels in just two years. Meanwhile, hotel inspector Alasdair travels to the Lake District to assess if a newly-signed hotel is up to brand standards. Narrated by Diane Morgan.(n)

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side

Danni Menzies has five options for their £150,000 budget, but whether the couple will be impressed enough to put in an offer remains to be seen.(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Car-fan Tony's 1962 Jaguar Mark 2 has been in his family for well over 40 years. Due to complications following a stomach operation, he hasn't been able to restore the car himself and it has been sitting neglected in a garage for nearly two decades. With Fuzz Townshend battling to start the Jag's engine and Tim Shaw having to get his hands dirty making parts, it's a race against the clock to get this British classic finished on time.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert contemplates leaving the police force to take up a job selling security systems, but the proposal receives a mixed reaction, leading to tense celebrations at his birthday party. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Brad Garrett and Patricia Heaton.(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is delighted to be awarded an honorary doctorate, but hurts Debra's feelings by thanking everyone except her in his acceptance speech. He claims it was an accident, though she takes the opportunity to remind him of past snubs that were obviously deliberate.(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Seattle shrink is delighted when a station in another city begins relaying his radio show - until he struggles to compete with the popularity of the host he has replaced. Elsewhere, Niles, Daphne and Martin's attempt to build a table does not go according to plan.(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne's birthday party sparks a series of unexpected events, and after a night of intimacy, Frasier pursues Roz to her family reunion in Wisconsin, where he pretends to be her estranged partner Roger. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Peri Gilpin.(n)

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer search Hampshire, Wiltshire and Surrey as they try to find homes for this week's couples. Retirees Sheila and Jason are living out of boxes after selling their home in Morecambe and now they just want to be nearer their families, while Sue and Alan have moved back from Australia, only to find their generous budget of £450,000 does not stretch to the spacious apartment they had Down Under - and getting them to downsize could prove an uphill struggle for Phil.(n)

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun

Now it's down to Gordon to motivate Natalie and save Michon's from disaster.(n)

programme.desc: Charlie goes along to Jake's parents' evening with hopes of seducing the teacher. programme.title: Two and a Half Men

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie is taken aback to learn his former girlfriend Lisa is getting married and resolves to prove he is a better family man than her fiance by organising a Thanksgiving get-together. programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan is devastated to learn Judith has found a new boyfriend, and begins to wallow in gloom. To help boost his confidence, Charlie and Jake try to give him a makeover, but eventually admit defeat and bring in a gay man to choose the perfect outfit.(n)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: A long-time crush of Charlie finally agrees to go on a date with him, as long as she can bring her sister - who will also need an escort. programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A man has to call in eviction specialists to remove tenants from the house he inherited from his grandparents. Music entrepreneur Donovan has not received rent from one of his tenants for seven months, so the case ends up in court.(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Catching up with tenants and landlords from previous episodes, including a man living in a damp and mouldy flat, who was unable to sleep in the bedroom due to the horrendous conditions. programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A woman owes five months' rent, but refuses to leave unless the bailiffs arrive, while a man wanted to sell his house post-breakup, but the tenants are still there five years later. Plus, a man happily living in his garden shed.(n)

Plus, Selina and Lee must return from America for a court case to recover £10,000 rent arrears on their UK property.(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

Elsewhere, two officers head to a car garage in Manchester where the owner owes £2,000 after losing a court case over a faulty vehicle.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: 8 Simple Rules
programme.desc: The Hennessys re-create one of Cate's earliest seasonal memories to entice CJ to spend Christmas with them rather than alone in Las Vegas. Meanwhile, Rory decides to break up with his wealthy girlfriend because he cannot afford to buy her an expensive gift. Starring David Spade and Martin Spanjers.(n)

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: The Kyles perform an act of charity by attending the funeral of an old lady they have never met, but unfortunately Kady is asked to kiss the corpse goodbye and Jay is press-ganged into singing her favourite R'n'B song.(n)

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Jay tries to get in shape for a marathon but Michael thinks he can do it without training. Meanwhile, Tony asks Claire to dress down in an effort to lessen her allure. American comedy, starring Damon Wayans.(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: After a four-year nightmare with the tenants of a cottage in north Wales, landlady Rachel gets a shock when she finally gains access to her property. Elsewhere, the Peterborough Council gets a tip-off which leads them to find a property with life-threatening electrics and damp, that could potentially be an overcrowded slum.(n)

programme.title: On Benefits
programme.sub-title: In Sickness and in Wealth: On Benefits
programme.desc: North West claimants struggling against medical and psychological issues while getting by on benefits. Blackpool martial arts enthusiast Mark hopes to get back into paid employment after being dismissed for breaking a colleague's nose, while Liverpool couple Clive and Sheila want to tie the knot on a benefits budget. Autistic Fleetwood man William struggles to get round due to a bad back and varicose veins. He needs a mobility scooter but has benefits have been cut.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Stewart and Iain head to Manchester, where a landlord is owed £8,000 in rent arrears and has already called for police back-up. As tempers rise, the pair must find a way to handle a situation that is spiralling dangerously out of control. Meanwhile, Brian and Del chase £3,000 owed to a firm of letting agents, before tracking a debtor who was accidentally over-paid for a job. Plus, Stewart and Iain face an eviction that is set to test their patience.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Ben face a challenging eviction in London, where a vulnerable tenant in rent arrears has barricaded her front door, and the agents receive a tirade of abuse. Meanwhile, Brian and Del chase a debt of nearly £2,000 in Surrey, before trying to recover almost £3,000 in Northamptonshire. Finally, Steve and Ru head to Portsmouth to evict a young family for a landlord who wants her property back.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In north London, agents Del and Dael chase nearly £2,000 owed by a printing company, but the owner denies the debt and starts getting physical. Meanwhile, Stewart and Elmor find themselves caught up in a personal dispute when they try to collect rent arrears from a barber's shop, and in Bedfordshire, Del and Brian try to recover almost £2,000 owed to a funeral director. Stewart and Vic track down a debt of £5,000 from the owner of a computer repair shop in Lincolnshire.(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Elly finds out that Claudia has offered to buy the island, Ned decides to take a new direction in life, and Susan and Karl's relationship deteriorates.(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: A phone call asking Leah to make a victim statement threatens to derail her recovery. Elsewhere, Maggie confides in Roo and tells her a secret.(n)

programme.title: On Benefits
programme.sub-title: On Benefits: Britain's Most Married Man
programme.desc: Profile of a 67-year-old Somerset man who is hoping to get married for the ninth time, once his 27-year-old fiancee arrives from the Philippines. Ron believes that having Cristel around to care for him during in his old age will make him less of a burden on the state. Plus, a Lowestoft carer who looks after his wife hopes that moving into their first proper home together will bring them more happiness, and an out-of-work Liverpool man dreams of a life on the ocean waves.(n)

programme.title: On Benefits
programme.sub-title: On Benefits: Depressed, Stressed and Repossessed
programme.desc: Stories of people struggling on benefits. Mark from Cheltenham is a part-time drag queen who lost his Spanish bar after a licensing dispute. Now home and claiming sickness benefits for depression, he is keen to get well enough to work again. Plus, the stories of a widowed grandmother whose life has been tough since her drug-addicted grandson was sent to prison for attacking her, and a 63-year-old joiner who cannot work because of back trouble.(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Elly finds out that Claudia has offered to buy the island, Ned decides to take a new direction in life, and Susan and Karl's relationship deteriorates.(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Colby is shocked to learn that Mac and Ari have become an item. Bella and Nik enjoy some quality time together, and Leah returns to work in the diner.(n)

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Homeless
programme.desc: Self-confessed daddy's girl Kaya spends three nights sleeping rough, convinced that her piano-playing skills and her looks will help her make enough money to pay for a hostel.(n)

programme.title: Britain's Council House Millionaires
programme.desc: Documentary about some of the nation's wealthiest buy-to-let landlords, who have made a fortune by buying up former council homes, and renting them out to those in need. Among those featured is a Manchester property magnate who buys properties in the city's less desirable areas and rents them to students at up to £400 a month for a room, a London estate agent who only deals in former council properties, and a Kent man who grew up in a council house, and recognises the quality of the construction.(n)

programme.title: The Gypsies Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary following travellers' constant struggle to co-exist with settled communities. Carol and her family cannot understand why her community is so hated and vilified, while local man Arthur is on a mission to understand what brings the travellers into parks and public areas - and Carol's caravan is his first stop. Johnny and his family live in a chalet in Essex but his non-traveller wife Andrea has had enough of feeling ostracised and wants to move back into a normal house.(n)

programme.title: Busted in Bangkok
programme.desc: Documentary following Thailand's tourist police, focusing on four of the country's holiday hotspots as officers and volunteers ensure the good times do not get out of hand. A drunken Brit has a bone to pick over a restaurant bill. But clashing with security guards isn't the wisest of moves, and soon the law enforcers are called in to keep the peace. In Pattaya, volunteer Freddie finds a holiday-maker covered in blood. Unfortunately, his attempts to help spark an unexpected reaction.(n)

programme.title: Austin Powers: International Man of Mystery (1997)
programme.desc: A velvet-clad, sex-crazed secret agent from the 1960s agrees to be put into a state of suspended animation after his arch-enemy escapes justice. Thirty years later he is defrosted to do battle with the power-mad villain again, but the mission proves nearly as daunting for him as getting to grips with 1990s social values. Spoof spy adventure, with Mike Myers, Elizabeth Hurley, Mimi Rogers, Michael York and Robert Wagner.(n)

However, the supposed victim turns up dead, prompting Columbo to take action to unmask the killer. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Bradford Dillman and Ray Milland.(n)

programme.title: Columbo Goes to College (1991)
programme.desc: Two criminology students murder their professor and cover their tracks with false clues. They think they are on the way to outwitting everyone - but find themselves at the bottom of the class when Columbo intervenes. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Stephen Caffrey, Gary Hershberger and Robert Culp.(n)

programme.title: Columbo: The Most Dangerous Match (1973)
programme.desc: An American chess champion fears he is about to be beaten by a superior player from Russia, and decides the only sure-fire way he can avoid defeat is by murdering his opponent. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Laurence Harvey and Jack Kruschen.(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Uneasy Lies the Crown (1990)
programme.desc: A dentist with gambling debts discovers his wife is having an affair with one of his patients and wants a divorce. He plans to take revenge by poisoning the lover with his wife's heart medication, so she will be suspected - but he reckons without the attentions of the crumpled cop. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, James Read, Paul Burke, Jo Anderson and Nancy Walker.(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Any Old Port in a Storm (1973)
programme.desc: A vineyard owner's financial security is jeopardised when his playboy younger brother threatens to sell the family winery. He resorts to killing his sibling and rigging the death scene to look like a scuba-diving accident. However, the crumpled cop sees through the ruse and in the process reveals he is something of a wine buff himself. Detective drama, with Peter Falk, Donald Pleasence and Julie Harris.(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Ashes to Ashes (1998)
programme.desc: The shabby sleuth investigates the complex case of a murdered Hollywood gossip writer. He uses his unique talents to interrogate a smooth-talking funeral director, who was once romantically involved with the victim and one of the last people to see her alive. Detective drama, with Peter Falk. Patrick McGoohan co-stars and directs.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A Ukrainian illegal immigrant working as a prostitute is murdered in a motel room, setting in motion an investigation that leads to a writer secretly profiling the singles scene. At first his guilt seems a foregone conclusion - but as inquiries continue, Falacci and Logan begin to suspect he is being framed. Crime drama, starring Chris Noth and Alicia Witt.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The rape and murder of a criminology student puts detectives Stabler and Benson on the trail of a killer with an expert knowledge of forensics. A discovery about the victim's mentor places him at the top of their list of suspects - but as further evidence is gathered, it begins to seem that someone might have tried to frame him for the crime.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detective Munch becomes personally involved in the prosecution of a terminally ill embryologist who is accused of assisting a depressed woman in committing suicide. programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the murder of a poster boy for a pressure group that tries to steer gay people towards heterosexuality. Suspicion falls on a cleric who was conducting a hate-mail campaign against the victim - but it transpires he has a watertight alibi. George Segal guest stars.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A wealthy philanthropist who was accused of rape and kidnap is killed. Jacqueline Bisset guest stars alongside Mariska Hargitay.(n)

programme.desc: A missing US Navy lieutenant's car is found covered in blood, and the team discovers she had been profiling men to find the perfect partner. programme.desc: The team joins forces with military investigators to ascertain whether terrorists were responsible for an explosion at a golf course in which a marine colonel was killed. programme.desc: One of Reeves' friends is kidnapped, and when the agents investigate, they discover their suspect is a man who disappeared two days earlier - with confidential military information.(n)

programme.desc: Benson and Stabler investigate the murder of an elderly woman who they learn was dying of cancer but had been determined to live out her final days to the full - a philosophy that encompassed dating a variety of men. programme.desc: Novak enlists Clark's help to gather evidence against a judge whose unacceptable bias in two child-abuse cases resulted in the death of a youngster and the wrongful imprisonment of an innocent woman. programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The discovery of a child's body sends Stabler and Cragen in search of a suspected paedophile, but important medical evidence emerges that implicates someone close to the child. Crime drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Dann Florek.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A fugitive sex offender kidnaps his accuser, leading Detectives Benson and Stabler to question the man's dying mother to discover where he is heading. programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: The consultant helps sue a pharmaceutical company when a former employee commits suicide during a drug trial. However, the task is complicated when the company brings in its own scientist to oppose the claim. Michael Weatherly stars.(n)

programme.desc: A police officer is shot dead and the chief suspect's confession appears to bring an end to the matter, but his media-savvy lawyer presents a case accusing the force of a string of errors - as well as perceived racism. programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A 14-year-old boy is killed in a drive-by shooting, and investigatations lead Logan to a local gun dealer who is the suspect in another recent incident. However, things become complicated for Briscoe when the son of an old friend is also implicated in the crime.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman is killed by a letter-bomb, and her scientist husband becomes the chief suspect when it is discovered that the couple were planning to divorce, but the victim was intentionally delaying the proceedings.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the death of a Russian model, and when the autopsy reveals a host of old injuries they suspect long-term abuse. Further tests are made on the body, and the findings suggest medical malpractice may have been the cause, leading the detectives to track down the person responsible for her death. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A Japanese nightclub owner is killed while visiting New York, and a singer who once worked for the victim is arrested on suspicion of murder. While working on the case, Olivet is forced to confront memories of her sexual assault. Guest starring Laura Linney.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Assistant DAs McCoy and Kincaid put their careers on the line in search of the truth behind the death of a wealthy woman. Meanwhile, detectives question the victim's first and second husbands, and her teenage daughter.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a lance corporal, whose body has been found in an empty house, and discovers he had a number of spurned lovers and a $2million inheritance. Ducky and Gibbs interview one of the dead marine's partners, but disagree over whether she is telling the truth. David McCallum and Mark Harmon star.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Kidnappers strike on Halloween, wounding a marine sergeant and snatching his daughter - leaving the team members wondering why anyone would try to extort money from someone on such a modest salary. As the agents begin searching for a motive, Abby surprises everyone by turning up at the lab in a revealing fancy-dress costume.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A former marine falls to his death from a hotel balcony, and investigations quickly lead to the discovery of another body. As Gibbs and the team dig deeper, they uncover evidence that points to the activities of a vice ring trafficking young girls. Mark Harmon, David McCallum, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette star.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: McGee tries to help his sister, who believes she may have murdered someone - but is too traumatised and disorientated to remember exactly what happened. As the team investigates the connected case of a sailor's death, Tony and Abby find themselves distracted by relationship problems. Drama, starring Sean Murray, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate the murder of a diver of Middle Eastern descent whose body has been found washed ashore on Coney Island. programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A school headmistress is caught on camera sexually assaulting a teenage boy, but her behaviour later proves to have been caused by an operable brain tumour, prompting Novak and the team to allow a plea bargain. Unfortunately, the case turns out to have unforeseen complications. Starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Diane Neal.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Part two of three. The investigation into the warring prostitution rings threatens to tear the SVU team apart, but the squad is determined to uncover the truth. Cragen also stands accused of murder. Return of the crime drama, starring Dann Florek and Mariska Hargitay.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Investigations reveal that the murder of a college student was linked to his role as pledgemaster of his fraternity, but Stabler and Benson are mystified when the murdered boy's father agrees to represent the accused. Drama, guest starring Serena Williams, with Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay.(n)

programme.title: Fantasy Homes by the Sea
programme.desc: Presenter Catherine Gee helps couples find their dream coastal properties. She begins with Londoners Jess and Brian, who want to move to the Gower peninsula in south Wales, and have amassed a budget of half a million pounds to help them in their quest for seaside surroundings.(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping Feature. Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one.(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: In Greater Manchester, Nick Knowles and the team visit Wigan to help a couple complete work on their living room. The project was left half finished after Caroline Davies imposed a ban on her husband Mike, who had recently undergone heart surgery, doing any more building work. Designer Julia Kendell embarks on a mission to prove that blue is not a cold colour.(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team visit Essex to help the Taylor family, who desperately need a bathroom downstairs for wheelchair-user Kerry. Designer Julia Kendell has her work cut out transforming the garage into a contemporary shower-room that has the access needed without compromising on style.(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team visit Gosport, Hampshire, to see how they can help Cathy Walton. Her partner died in a freak accident and her lounge is filled with props holding the ceiling up. She has a weakness for glamour, so designer Julia Kendell creates a living space which is family friendly and has a touch of sparkle.(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles, designer Julia Kendall and the team visit Upchurch, Kent, to create a stylish kitchen for a family who have had to live apart since the front of their house collapsed during an overzealous attempt to dig the footings for an extension.(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles hosts the show that helps amateurs whose projects have gone horribly wrong. David Robinson was discharged from the Army for medical reasons after being injured in Iraq, and with little in the way of savings, was forced to use his own disastrous DIY skills. Nick and the team are dispatched to the family home in Bridgwater, Somerset, to rescue the results.(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles heads to Duxford in Cambridgeshire, where he enlists the help of local tradespeople to assist Paul and Sarah Behan. The couple had started on an extension to their small bungalow when the project had to be abandoned due to their son Joshua being diagnosed with a rare and aggressive form of liver cancer. The team puts in an impressive effort, but with only nine days to finish the job the challenge is extensive.(n)

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

Despite years of searching Terri has found no trace of her. Plus, 46-year-old Nicole Engel seeks the nephew she hasn't seen for almost 20 years.(n)

programme.title: Whose Truth Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Through the personal experience of a veteran Washington journalist, we explore the unique challenges and threats to journalism in the Trump era.(n)

programme.title: Meet the Lords
programme.desc: The Government threatens to trim the Lords' powers if they rebel again and Lord Strathclyde publishes his review into the powers the upper house have to block legislation. Cameras follow Labour peer Alf Dubs as he attempts to push through an amendment to the Immigration Bill to allow unaccompanied refugee children into the country, while Admiral Alan West isn't happy about a public poll that has voted overwhelmingly to name a new polar research ship Boaty McBoatface and raises a question about it.(n)

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Featuring inspirational walks from around Britain.(n)

programme.title: A Handful of Dust (1989)
programme.desc: A couple's life is disrupted by a penniless woman who arrives for the weekend, setting in motion a disastrous sequence of events. Drama, starring Judi Dench, whose performance won her a Bafta award, and James Wilby.(n)

programme.title: Friend or Foe (1982)
programme.desc: Two Second World War evacuees face a dilemma when they meet a German pilot who has been shot down. Family drama, starring John Bardon and Stacey Tendeter.(n)

programme.title: Death Drums Along the River (1963)
programme.desc: A British inspector is called to Africa to investigate the murder of a fellow policeman and uncovers a diamond-smuggling operation seemingly connected to an upriver hospital. Mystery, based on Edgar Wallace's novel Sanders on the River, starring Richard Todd, Marianne Koch, Albert Lieven and Walter Rilla.(n)

programme.title: Elenya (1992)
programme.desc: Aa 12-year-old half-Italian Welsh schoolgirl stumbles across a wounded German airman during the Second World War and secretly cares for him - only for tragedy to strike as the local townsfolk discover what she has been up to. Drama, starring Pascale Delafourge Jones, Klaus Behrendt, Margaret John and Sue Jones Davies.(n)

programme.title: Turn the Key Softly (1953)
programme.desc: Three women are released from prison and set about the difficult task of staying on the straight and narrow. Drama, starring Joan Collins, Yvonne Mitchell and Kathleen Harrison.(n)

programme.title: Blitz Spirit (2019)
programme.desc: Short film set during the London Blitz, in which a pianist struggles to justify his war efforts to his stubborn mother.(n)

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring Soho and Milllwall, with fascinating facts for locals and tourists alike. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay.(n)

programme.desc: Featuring inspirational walks from around Britain.(n)

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: How southerners reacted to the threat of Hitler's V1 flying bombs, which killed 452 people in a week at one point in the campaign. Notoriously inaccurate, the doodlebugs often fell short of their target and hit villages along the south coast from Kent to Dorset, prompting thousands in Chiselhurst to start living in caves.(n)

programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Doctor
programme.desc: Michael Mosley and the team are in Chester to learn about an experiment to find out whether standing up a few more hours each day could have major health benefits. Gabriel Weston witnesses a womb transplant, Saleyha Ahsan shows how to stop someone choking and Chris van Tulleken finds out if vitamin supplements are important to wellbeing.(n)

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent.(n)

programme.title: A Random Encounter (2013)
programme.desc: Two strangers trying to make their way in Hollywood meet by chance in a coffee shop, and come away unable to stop thinking about one another. However, they both soon discover that they have no way of tracking the other down. Romantic comedy, starring Abby Wathen, Michael Rady, Meghan Markle and Sean Young.(n)

programme.title: Kidnapping Freddy Heineken (2015)
programme.desc: Five men struggling to make ends meet decide to kidnap a beer tycoon who is one of Europe's richest men. The plan is a success, and they demand the biggest ransom in history - but tensions within the group threaten their chances of escaping the law. Fact-based crime drama, starring Anthony Hopkins, Jim Sturgess and Sam Worthington.(n)

programme.title: Orphans of Isis
programme.desc: Karen Nettleton has spent five years trying to rescue her grandchildren and great-grandchildren from Syria. With their jihadist parents dead, they are stuck in a refugee camp.(n)

programme.title: Danny Dyer's Real Football Factories
programme.desc: Danny Dyer explores the nature of football hooliganism in Scotland, focusing on sectarian violence.(n)

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld

programme.desc: A secretly gay barrister discovers his lover has been driven to suicide by blackmailers, who have also extorted money from several other men. Drama, starring Dirk Bogarde, Sylvia Syms, Dennis Price and Anthony Nicholls.(n)

programme.title: Oxford Street Revealed
programme.desc: Police instinct brings about a lucky break when the anti-theft team cracks down on pickpockets. The paparazzi and celebrities are out for a charity launch, a tourist takes a nasty fall on the Tube, and two new restaurants are opening simultaneously at a department store, presenting technological challenges for staff. Also featuring the Hare Krishnas dedicated to bringing a little spirituality to the world's most famous shopping street.(n)

programme.title: D-Day: The Shortest Day
programme.desc: Survivors provide a compelling insight into the D-Day landings, discussing the preparations, their actions, and the consequences of an operation which had such a crucial bearing on the outcome of the Second World War.(n)

programme.title: Run
programme.desc: Recovering heroin addict Richard spends every day struggling to stay off drugs and only one thing spurs him on - the possibility of re-establishing contact with his teenage daughter. Faced with the prospect of never seeing her again, he's torn between returning to his old ways and salvaging the only relationship that matters to him. The third of four dramas telling the stories of seemingly unconnected people facing life-changing decisions, starring Lennie James, Mona Hammond, Darren Raymond and Brad Damon.(n)

programme.title: Warrior Challenge
programme.desc: Action from a UCMMA event, the mixed martial arts promotion that stages bouts at The Troxy.(n)

programme.title: Silk
programme.desc: Kate tries to make use of Clive in her mission to eject Billy from his position at Shoe Lane. However, the veteran clerk realises what is happening, and asks his opposite number at another set of chambers to lure the womanising barrister away with the promise of a better job. Meanwhile, Martha defends an Asian policewoman accused of racism, but she is distracted by hearing that former client Mark Draper has been arrested for murder. Legal drama, starring Rupert Penry-Jones and Neil Stuke.(n)

programme.title: We Still Steal the Old Way (2017)
programme.desc: After their exploits in We Still Kill the Old Way, criminal outfit the Archer Gang encounters an old enemy when a daring heist ends with them behind bars, however that doesn't stop them attempting to break out an old friend. Prison drama, starring Ian Ogilvy, Billy Murray, Julian Glover and Lysette Anthony.(n)

programme.title: Danny Dyer's Real Football Factories
programme.desc: Following on from the 2006 World Cup in Germany, host Danny Dyer provides an insight into the history of violence among England supporters.(n)

programme.title: Strangerland (2015)
programme.desc: A couple move to a remote town in the Australian Outback, but their new life takes a tragic turn when their teenage children disappear during a dust storm. As the townsfolk mount a search, tension and suspicion rise and public opinion quickly turns against the parents. Thriller, starring Nicole Kidman, Joseph Fiennes and Hugo Weaving.(n)

programme.desc: Featuring inspirational walks from around Britain.(n)

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life.(n)

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The girls investigate a plan to rig a male beauty contest by transforming the finalists.(n)

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: John Peter invents a cure for tiredness, but it ends up turning people into zombies.(n)

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Faxe finds a wolf cub in the forest, but its mother thinks he is a threat to her child and goes on the warpath.(n)

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Faxe rescues a whale, which then follows him everywhere - and risks accidentally sinking the Drakkar.(n)

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The lively zebra challenges the monkeys to a race around the island.(n)

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The lively zebra invites his friends to a sleep-over, but things do not go according to plan.(n)

programme.title: Tashi
programme.desc: A dragon becomes angry because it has a rotten tooth. The boys try to fix it, but to do so they need to steal something from the giant's cave.(n)

programme.title: Tashi
programme.desc: Jack and his new pet, a baby kraken, investigate a series of strange thefts - but gets accused of being the crook when the Warlord's fishing trophy is stolen.(n)

programme.desc: Survivors provide a compelling insight into the D-Day landings, discussing the preparations, their actions, and the consequences of an operation which had such a crucial bearing on the outcome of the Second World War.(n)

programme.title: Whistle Down the Wind (1961)
programme.desc: Three children become convinced that a bearded murderer taking refuge in the barn on their Lancashire farm is Jesus Christ, and do their utmost to protect him and conceal his presence from the outside world. Drama, based on the novel by Mary Hayley Bell, starring Alan Bates, Hayley Mills, Bernard Lee and Norman Bird.(n)

programme.title: Elenya (1992)
programme.desc: Aa 12-year-old half-Italian Welsh schoolgirl stumbles across a wounded German airman during the Second World War and secretly cares for him - only for tragedy to strike as the local townsfolk discover what she has been up to. Drama, starring Pascale Delafourge Jones, Klaus Behrendt, Margaret John and Sue Jones Davies.(n)

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Featuring Lee, Bermondsey and Stratford. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay.(n)

programme.title: Property Ladder
programme.desc: Homeowners work to increase the value of their properties, redesigning and refurbishing for maximum profits.(n)

programme.title: Horizon
programme.sub-title: Horizon: Why Did I Go Mad?
programme.desc: For hundreds of years, psychiatry has treated voices and hallucinations as an enemy. But today new scientific and psychological insights into how the brain works are leading to a radical rethink on what such experiences are - and how they should be treated. Cameras follow three people living with voices, hallucinations and paranoia, to explore what causes this kind of phenomena.(n)

programme.title: Horizon
programme.sub-title: Immortal? A Horizon Guide to Ageing
programme.desc: Veteran presenter Johnny Ball looks back over the years that both he and TV series Horizon have been appearing on air to find out what scientists have learnt about how and why people grow old. He charts developments from macabre early claims of rejuvenation to the latest breakthroughs, and asks if the dream of immortality is any closer to coming true.(n)

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: Documentary investigating allegations that a lack of proper controls is allowing financial, physical and even sexual abuse to take place within Britain's mosques. Over a year in the making, this programme exposes how worshippers' generosity can be exploited by religious leaders and how extreme groups can assume control of a community.(n)

programme.title: Cardboard Gangsters (2017)
programme.desc: A gang of lads selling drugs in Darndale in Dublin's Northside sets out to gain more money and power and enter the big leagues of the narcotics trade. Things begin to unravel quickly as not everyone in the area is willing to let them achieve the notoriety they crave without a fight. Thriller, starring John Connors and Fionn Walton.(n)

programme.title: Kidnapping Freddy Heineken (2015)
programme.desc: Five men struggling to make ends meet decide to kidnap a beer tycoon who is one of Europe's richest men. The plan is a success, and they demand the biggest ransom in history - but tensions within the group threaten their chances of escaping the law. Fact-based crime drama, starring Anthony Hopkins, Jim Sturgess and Sam Worthington.(n)

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz show in which pairs of contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions posed to 100 people before the show. At the end of each round, the team with the most points is eliminated until the final two pairs battle for the chance to compete for a cash prize. Presented by Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman.(n)

programme.title: TV's Greatest Gameshows
programme.desc: Roy Walker is joined by celebs and past competitors to explore what makes game shows great, including the biggest winners, unluckiest losers and most memorable tantrums.(n)

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. programme.title: All Star Family Fortunes
programme.desc: Singer, TV presenter and 2010 Queen of the Jungle Stacey Solomon takes part in the game show opposite Emmerdale's Danny Miller (Aaron Livesy). Vernon Kay hosts.(n)

programme.title: Strike It Lucky
programme.desc: Michael Barrymore hosts the madcap game show, in which three teams of two prove seek to progress along a board game-style path by answering questions. Each duo are allowed to determine how many spaces they would like to move by answering the corresponding number of questions. Landing on a space reveals it's hidden contents, which could amount to a prize, or a 'hot spot', which causes contestants to forfeit their gathered winnings.(n)
